original_snippet_context: Discussing the impact of valorization on coffee farms and the use of funds from the convênio (likely Taubaté).
relevant_quote: É, pois, nesse negocio que coube a alguem a gloria de empregar os 330 mil contos restantes das letras de cambio offerecidas pela lavoura, pois que nesse mesmo negocio se empregaram com vantagem effeitos das noticias do convênio.
justification: The text indirectly suggests support for the Convênio de Taubaté (which included provisions for a Caixa de Conversão) by highlighting its positive effects on the coffee sector, aligning with the expansionist aim of supporting agricultural interests through the Caixa.
